description: This pipeline processes image data by extracting properties from regions of interest and storing them as annotations, then applying various operations such as removing columns, merging annotations, and exporting results to files, ultimately generating output tables and files that summarize the processed data.

4faefe10-72b3-40f9-b8fb-69f9026934ac.name: ij1-roi-to-annotations
4faefe10-72b3-40f9-b8fb-69f9026934ac.description: Extracts properties of the ROI lists and stores them into annotations. This will create a list of annotation values if there are multiple ROI per list, unless you choose the option to only return the first entry. By default, one value per ROI is generated. Enable de-duplication to disable this behavior.

Enable de-duplication to disable this behavior.

96b554ca-475e-4700-b47f-d692126f2f62.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name

6feb136d-815f-4d33-a53c-cff76abff0db.name: iji-export-table-v2
6feb136d-815f-4d33-a53c-cff76abff0db.description:
Exports a results table to CSV/XLSX

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

364f654c-2dda-4e6f-a78d-21ce7e43df46.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name

170ff0ed-2c3a-45c1-bcd1-441bb1d6dae5.name: table-apply-expression-per-row-v2
170ff0ed-2c3a-45c1-bcd1-441bb1d6dae5.description: Applies an expression for each row. The column values are available as variables.

3b23d774-3df6-446a-b842-15589482ba8d.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name

1e407b23-8de7-455d-8d02-2bbc06bfea9c.name: annotate-set-single
1e407b23-8de7-455d-8d02-2bbc06bfea9c.description: Sets a single annotation. The name and the value are determined by expressions

eb6938f1-dcb6-4ade-9244-5d915347cfde.name: data-to-annotation-table
eb6938f1-dcb6-4ade-9244-5d915347cfde.description:
Converts data into an annotation table that contains all annotations of the data row. You can also add a string representation of the data.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of multiple data items. If you want to group all data into one output, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave 'Data set matching annotations' empty.

fc16ce02-e634-4c1a-a0cb-b49f66e90766.name: ij1-roi-to-annotations
fc16ce02-e634-4c1a-a0cb-b49f66e90766.description: Extracts properties of the ROI lists and stores them into annotations. This will create a list of annotation values if there are multiple ROI per list, unless you choose the option to only return the first entry. By default, one value per ROI is generated. Enable de-duplication to disable this behavior.

1d128a57-9909-444f-b53d-e085e8a56603.name: annotation-merge
1d128a57-9909-444f-b53d-e085e8a56603.description:
Merges the annotations of all incoming data and outputs the same data with those merged annotations.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
